title: Page Content Sections

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: sections
fields.instructions: Add sections to the page. Layouts are grouped by category (Banners, Content, etc.) in the dropdown to make them easier to find.

sub_fields.label: Highlight points
sub_fields.name: highlight_points
sub_fields.instructions: Each row: title line (blue highlight + dark text) and supporting paragraph.

sub_fields.name: id
sub_fields.instructions: Unique ID (e.g. card-1)

sub_fields.instructions: Optional. When set with headingHighlight, overrides mainTitle for display.

sub_fields.label: Heading

sub_fields.label: Intro

sub_fields.label: Heading — before highlight
sub_fields.name: headingBefore
sub_fields.instructions: First line of the title, before the orange word (e.g. "How ").

sub_fields.label: Heading — highlighted word
sub_fields.name: headingHighlight
sub_fields.instructions: Orange word in the first line (e.g. "SoftCo").

sub_fields.label: Heading — after highlight
sub_fields.name: headingAfter
sub_fields.instructions: Rest of the first line after the orange word (e.g. " supports your").

sub_fields.label: Subheading (second line)
sub_fields.name: subheading
sub_fields.instructions: Second line of the main heading (e.g. "strategic priorities").

sub_fields.label: Deliverable

sub_fields.label: Body

sub_fields.label: Heading highlight (blue)
sub_fields.name: headingHighlight
sub_fields.instructions: First word or phrase in brand blue (e.g. Automate).

sub_fields.label: Heading line 1 after highlight
sub_fields.name: headingLine1After
sub_fields.instructions: Text after the blue segment on line 1 (e.g. " for").

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Recommended 581×506px.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Use a blank line between paragraphs.
sub_fields.default_value:
SoftCo is AP automation built for the complexity you actually have. Multi-ERP, multi-entity, multi-jurisdiction. Configured around your approval chains, your compliance rules, and your reporting structure. Not a template applied to your business. A system that fits it.

Where other AP automation handles the straightforward invoices, SoftCo handles those and the exceptions, queries, and edge cases that consume your team's time and create your risk exposure.

sub_fields.label: Intro Body
sub_fields.name: introBody
sub_fields.default_value: Real-time AP analytics that give you full visibility across every invoice, entity, and exception.

sub_fields.label: Answer
sub_fields.name: answer
sub_fields.default_value: Most clients are live within 8–12 weeks, depending on the complexity of their ERP landscape and number of entities.

sub_fields.label: Body

sub_fields.label: Body

sub_fields.instructions: Use a blank line between paragraphs.
sub_fields.default_value: Team workload. Approval bottlenecks. Exception queues. Processing status by person. This is the operational view that lets you manage the AP function with data, not instinct. Updated in real time. Filterable by team member, supplier, or status. The view that means your next conversation with the CFO starts with evidence.

description: Flexible content sections for pages. Used by the Next.js frontend.
